title: LemonLib
description:
Library for my mods that prevents any repeat code. Handles my Patreon stuff as well, with fancy colors and stuff that looks really cool. More info can be found at the Github.

 

Required dependency for:
MiniUtilities
Rest of my Mods unless stated
body:
Library for my mods that isn't useless, just prevents any repeat code. Handles my Patreon stuff as well, with fancy colors and stuff that looks really cool. More info can be found at the Github.

 

Mods that this is a required dependency for:

XLFoodMod

MiniUtilities

Most of my bigger mods, unless stated

 

Report bugs at https://discord.gg/Dq2KEauuTD
